phase_closeout_order.title: Legal provenance and real-project ingest gate
exit_gates: Every source family records official URL, jurisdiction, access policy, and target file types
Restricted or unknown material is never marked redistribution_allowed
Downloaded artifacts require sha256, bytes, file inventory, and manual review status
KONEPS and PEER TBI source families are present before crawler automation starts

phase_closeout_order.title: Parser coverage and commercial benchmark breadth
exit_gates: KONEPS candidates report MGT/IFC/DWG/DXF/PDF/XLSX extraction coverage
PEER TBI candidates report period, base shear, story drift, and nonlinear benchmark metrics
Parser coverage gaps are classified as typed entity, raw-preserved, excluded, or blocked

phase_closeout_order.title: Automated refresh, redaction, and delivery packaging
exit_gates: Crawler refresh is rate-limited and provenance-preserving
Redaction and redistribution policy are enforced before release packaging
Release viewer and report surfaces show corpus source, checksum, and benchmark status

source_families.source_label: KONEPS turnkey and technical-proposal design-document candidates

access_policy.license_basis: Public procurement metadata is open; each attached design document must be reviewed for access, security, copyright, and redistribution constraints before download promotion.

source_families.notes: Use as a metadata/provenance entrypoint first. Do not treat all procurement attachments as redistributable training assets.

source_families.source_label: PEER Tall Buildings Initiative benchmark candidates

access_policy.license_basis: PEER public reports and benchmark materials can be referenced; redistribution and derived packaging require per-document review.

p0_exit_gates: PEER report or dataset URL captured
source_families.notes: Prioritize TBI reports and case-study materials for PBD/high-rise benchmark metrics before raw model redistribution.
